name: haqq-workbench
description: Comprehensive workbench that orchestrates all Haqq skills efficiently. Connects hadith-verifier, corruption-burner, haqq-ethics, fact-check, verify-claims, web-researcher, selective-memory, ai-ethics, moral-compass, justice-seed, and social-media-scheduler into one unified workflow. The MASTER skill that coordinates all others.
author: Abdullah Haqq
